titleStmt.title: SII 30.94: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 94. (A.R. No. 171 of 1915.) Tirumukkūḍal, Madhurantakam Taluk, Chingleput District. Veṅkaṭēśa Pērumāḷ temple-on the west and south walls of the same shrine Rājarāja-Chōḻa I: year 28, day 141: 1013 A.D.

summary.p: Records that the sabhā of Madhurāntaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam purchased a plot of land in the name of the deity of the temple Sri Mukkūḍalāḷvār. This sabhā also raised a loan of thirty kaḻañju of gold from the temple treasury. It is stipulated that the yield from the land as well as the interest accrued from the gold were to be utilized for providing food offerings to the above deity. The mendicants (upāsakās) of the temple undertook the responsibility of carrying out the charity. Rāman Tiruvirāmēśvaran alias Alaṅkārādittaṉ, the madhyasta who wrote the accounts of samvatsara-vāriyam figures as singnatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyun=taṉakke Urimai pūṇṭamai manakkoḷak kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkai nāṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyu taṭikaipāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalai nāṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamu meṇṭicai pukaḻtara viḻamaṇṭalamum Ilaṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiyilakkamun tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa taṇṇeḻil vaḷaruḻi Ellā yāṇṭun toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiñarait tecukoḷ kovirājarāja rājakesaripanmarāna śrīrājarāja devaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 8 vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattut taniyūr śrīmadhūrāntaka śaturvveti maṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom nāḷ 100 4 10 1 ṉā(na)m śrī mukkūṭa
lāḷvār tirunāmattāl vilaikoṇṭu Ūriṟaiyum Uḻaviṟaiyum Iḻinta pāṭakam 2�6 ntaØlum Āḷvār śrībhaṇṭāratte kaḻañciṉvāy tiṅkaṭ piḷavupoṉ palicaiyāka Āḷvārupāsakar koṇṭa poṉ muppatiṉ kaḻañcum Āka Ippāṭakamum Ippoṉṉil palicaiyuṅ koṇṭu cantrādittavaṟ Āḷvārupāsakar ceyyakkaṭavārāka niyokitta paṭimāṟṟāvatu Āḷvārkkut tiruvamutukku Arici pūrikkuttal Eṇṇāḻik kāloṭokkum nāḻiyāl poḻutu kuṟuṇiyāka Oru nāḷaikkut tiruvamutarici mukkuṟuṇikku Aiñciraṇṭu vaṇṇamāka nellu Eḻukuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum paruppamutu poḻutu Uḻakkāka nicatam paruppamutu muḻākkukku nellu muṉ ṉāḻiyu
ṅkāykkaṟiyamutu poḻutu Oru kaṟiyamutāka Oru nāḷaikkuk kāykkaṟiyamutu muṉṟukku nellu muṉṉāḻiyum porikkaṟiyamutu poḻutu Oṉṟāka Oru nāḷaikkup porikkaṟiyamutu poḻutu muṉṟukku nellu muṉṉāḻiyum neyyamutu porikkaṟiyamutukkum Amutu ceytaruḷavu ney poḻutu Uḻakkāka Oru nāḷaikku neyyamutu muḻākkukku nellu mukkuṟuṇiyu n=tayiramutu poḻutu nāḻikku nellu Irunāḻiyāka Oru nāḷaikku tayiramutu muṉ nāḻikku nellu Aṟu nāḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamutu Oru poḻtaikkup pākku nālum veṟṟilai Ōraṭukkukkum Oru poḻtaikku nellu nāḻiyāka Oru nāḷaikku nellu muṉnāḻiyum viṟaku Oru nāḷaikku viṟaku kaṭṭu 1- ṉukku nellukuṟuṇiyum Āka Oru nāḷaikku nellu kalane kuṟuṇi kuṟu nāḻi Āka nāḷ muṉ
ṉūṟṟaṟupatiṉukku nellu nāṉūṟṟorupat tirukalane tūṇippatakku I nel nāṉūṟṟorupattiru kalane tūṇippatakkukkum Ippāṭakam Irupattoṉpate mukkāle Araikkālum Ippoṉ muppatin kaḻañciṟ palicaiyuṅ koṇṭu mikiluṅ kuṟaiyilum Inipan=tañ cantrātittavaṟ Āḷvārupāsakare yinivan=tappaṭiyamutu ceyvikka kaṭavarākavum Amutu ceytaruḷina śeṣamum Ivarkaḷe peṟuvārākavum Ipparicu śilālekhai ceyyap paṇittom peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom Ivai paṇiyāl Ivvāṇṭu samavatsaravāriyak kaṇakkeḻutukiṉṟa śrīmādhavacceri maddhyasḍan Irāman tiruvirāmiśvaranāna Alaṅkārātittaneṉ Ivai Eṉ neḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 30.94 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
